name: Greenblatt — Special Situations
description: Heuristic for post-event entities: depressed valuation, recent corporate-action context, asset backing.

rules.name: below-tang-bv
rules.expr: p_tang_bv_quarter is not None and p_tang_bv_quarter <= 1.0

rules.name: improving-tape
rules.expr: ret_3m_pct is not None and ret_3m_pct >= 5

rules.name: insider-buying
rules.expr: net_insider_6m_pct is not None and net_insider_6m_pct >= 0
